description_long: This kiosk features a robust, blocky structure with a dark greenish-blue body and contrasting magenta top surfaces. The front is equipped with a digital display screen that reads 'Press Enter to Start,' suggesting an interactive or transactional function, possibly for ticketing or information. Below the screen, there is a recessed area with a pink keyboard-like panel and two yellow circular elements, likely buttons or touchpads. The sides and rear are solid, with no visible openings or windows, emphasizing security and durability. The kiosk's surfaces have a textured, slightly rough finish, and the overall design is geometric and utilitarian. The signage is integrated into the digital display, and there are no visible doors or windows.
description: A sturdy, geometric kiosk with a digital display, magenta top, and textured greenish-blue body, featuring interactive controls on the front. The design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, pink keyboard panel, and two yellow buttons set into a recessed area.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the kiosk's solid, blocky side and the angled placement of the digital display.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid, uninterrupted greenish-blue surface with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the solid side and angled display, with the interactive area partially visible.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front structure, displaying 'Press Enter to Start' in illuminated text
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with magenta top surface, no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern utilitarian with geometric, minimalist influences
